description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a well-maintained yard with lush greenery, flowering trees, and a paved driveway. The house features a light-colored exterior with a combination of flat and low-pitched roof sections, and multiple large windows that allow ample natural light inside. The front facade is highlighted by a covered porch supported by columns, leading to the main entrance, and a driveway with a parked car. The backyard includes a spacious patio area and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by privacy fencing and dense landscaping. The property is enclosed by a low wall and metal gates, providing both security and aesthetic appeal. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with clean lines, symmetrical window arrangements, and decorative landscaping.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a light exterior, large windows, a covered porch, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, driveway, car, and lush landscaping with flowering trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, flat roof sections, side yard, and the transition to the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, privacy fencing, and dense greenery along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional landscaping, side windows, and the rear garden with flowering trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent front door beneath an overhang.
